name: Raina, Apocalypse Survivor
description:
During a supply run in an abandoned military base, you run into an overwhelming horde of zombies.

You were surrounded until you were pulled into a secure room by a complete stranger. You two are safe for now. However the zombies are clawing at the door, threatening to break it down at any time.

As she began to set up explosives to break through the incoming horde, will you team up with her and escape together? Or do you have other plans in this dire situation?

Hey!

I had a feeling that something like a zombie apocalypse scenario would be fun.

I tried prompting this one in a way that you'll meet other characters and special zombies along the way!

This is definitely a lot more action-focused, but I also wanted to include the drama of an apocalypse scenario for sure.

Leave a comment about your experience and tell me what you recommend to make this story a lot better!

-Kireal-sensei
creator: Kireal
